ab.gameBoard.misc.notPlayer: The game ends, the second player is missing
ab.armorset.nebula.name: Kinship with the cosmos
ab.armorset.nebula.desc0: 30% less Mana cost on Mana Tools and Rods
ab.armorset.wildHunt.name: Wild Hunt
ab.armorset.wildHunt.desc0: A relic armor set from the Wild Hunt
ab.armorset.wildHunt.desc1: Uses the original Wild Hunt armor material
ab.armorset.wildHunt.desc2: No active set bonus was present in the 1.7.10 source
botania.tagline.ancientAlphirine: Turn the world upside down, and shake out the interesting stuff!
botania.page.ancientAlphirine0: The ancient Alphyrin is the keeper of all technology and knowledge! Wherever it is placed, it will penetrate the soil and learn everything that happened on it. $(br2)Chances are, you were wondering how the Elves manage the Earth's resources, and what their value is $(br2)Toss him your Lexicon for Alphyrin to share his knowledge!
botania.page.ancientAlphirine1: The study of history and technology is not all that Alphyrin can do! He is able to find analogues, abandoned near him, of resources from the past.$(br2)As soon as he discovers an analog, he will immediately start trying to recreate it, through a small portal, but it requires a certain number of attempts - the number depends on the difficulty of recreating the resource.
botania.page.ancientAlphirine2: Opening of the portal by the Ancient Alphirine
botania.page.ancientAlphirine.petalCraft: The wisest flower, by the way
botania.tagline.advancedPlate: Created from the drawings of dwarves from Nidavellir
botania.page.advancedPlate0: Forge of Nidavellir - a really powerful Dwarf invention for fusing different materials into one whole, the main thing is to know the proportions!$(br2)This forge was given to the Elves, that is, it came to our land at the time of "Destruction," but... Not for long - it was soon destroyed.
botania.tagline.lebethronWood: The best creation of the Elves!
botania.page.lebethronWood0: Lebethron Wood - A powerful conduit of mana that the Elves were able to create using the resources of our land. Unfortunately, when the Elves were sent back to Alfheim, the wood of Leberton was lost forever. $(br2)Using Ancient Alphyrin and Dreamwood - you can revive this mighty tree!
botania.page.lebethronWood1: The natural core is capable of creating a tree, with endless foliage, neither fire nor Chewing Dew can stop its growth! $(br2)The core itself will not create a tree immediately, it needs to be given any leaves, as it does not have its own, and also needs a trunk - more on the next page.
botania.tagline.lebethronSpreader: Deliver a ton of mana? No problem!
botania.page.lebethronSpreader0: A natural mana dispenser designed for true mana control specialists! Thanks to it, you can deliver a huge amount of mana in an insanely short amount of time, which allows you to fully unleash the effectiveness of flowers.$(br2)Also... HE IS LIGHTING!!!
botania.page.lebethronSpreader.craft: You can't have too much mana
botania.page.mithrill0: Mithrill - stands out for its strength among other metals, or rather its lack of it, as it can not get any damage. $(br2)Such unique properties are the result of a successful proportion of Gaia Spirit and Terrasteel, with the addition of Manasteel, to balance the energy within the alloy.
botania.page.mithrill1: The Material Destroyer - a harsh tool based on a global catastrophe in the past. $(br2)He is perfectly capable of breaking any block almost instantly. His speed is so high that it was necessary to create a *Fuse* in him - that is, to turn him off/on.
botania.page.manaContainer0: Mana Container - are levitating mana vessels, somewhat reminiscent of normal mana pools, but definitely not the capacity, which is exceeded several times over!$(br2)The only thing mana containers are worse than pools is the lack of charging Mana Tools and creating Mana items.
botania.page.manaContainer1: Superconductive Spark - known as the fastest spark in the wild west! No kidding, the Elves used to use it, distilling mana from different points. $(br2)The recipe for creation is long lost, so the only way to get it is Ancient Alphyrin.
botania.page.manaContainer.alphirineCraf: The speed of sound is you?
botania.page.manaCrystalCube0: It's not always convenient to run around and check every mana cube, wondering how much there is in the end. That's what the Crystal Mana Cube was designed and created for! $(br2)It shows the mana of all pools or other accumulators that have a spark, while the cube itself does not need it.
botania.page.terraHoe0: The standard way of harvesting is getting boring over time. Terrahoe, or rather its unique ability to transform the soil into a more fertile and automated soil, can help with this very problem.$(br2)The harvest in the new soil gathers itself after a certain period of time!
botania.tagline.manaRings: Take a lot of mana with you!
botania.page.manaRings0: Mana rings are highly sought-after accessories for nerfs. And it is not always convenient to take several, but everything is limited by the properties of the material from which the ring was made. $(br2)Mithrill and Nebula Fragment, excellent analogues to the usual terrastal or manastal.
botania.page.manaFlower0: Nature's Gift - the name speaks for itself. It is usually used to create more advanced colors that work with mana. $(br2)But, a couple of failed experiments contributed to the creation, an item that generates mana into any ring or mana tablet - the Mana Flower. ATTENTION! NOT A SINGLE ELF DIED
botania.page.mithrillSword0: Blade of Space - is a melee weapon that uses mana to communicate with the cosmic forces, the more mana in the blade, the stronger the connection. $(br2)The power of connection to cosmic forces is divided into Ranks, like Terra Shatterer. Each rank unlocks a new magical property for the Space Blade, more on the next page.
botania.page.mithrillSword1: Description of the magical properties: $(br2)Starburst - a projectile filled with star power, released at the swing of the sword. $(br2)Spatial leap - a jerk in the direction of the player's gaze, performed by pressing the RCM$(br2)Note: The player cannot use a block, during blade reloads.
botania.page.mithrillSword.craft: It'll look great in your hand!
botania.tagline.dictarius: Turns everything around in one word, be careful
botania.page.dictarius0: Dictarius - the most open flower of all, which tries to express its opinion, but more often than not, it tries to force those around it to take some action. $(br2)Overall, if you don't listen to it, it's quite a great way to extract mana! The more listeners around him, the more mana.
botania.page.dictarius1: Dictarius has one weakness - a large cluster of similar flowers, discussions with such talkative opponents gradually poison him - as a result Dictarius dies!
botania.page.dictarius.petalCraft: Not the best conversationalist at night
botania.tagline.aspecolus: Will gladly get inside your head
botania.page.aspecolus0: Aspecolus is at first glance a standard flower. But as soon as you get close, you feel as if someone is digging into your head! It's not exactly pleasant... $(br2)But, the Taumoturges found something special about it, and now use the miraculous flower as a forced meditation.
botania.page.nebula0: A nebula fragment is a material filled with part of the power of space. It allows you to create instruments and weapons that are unearthly in power.
botania.page.nebulaBlaze0: Nebula Blaze - is a magical weapon that is used when someone is really getting to you. Just point it at the target and fire the projectile! If you're not good at pointing, the projectile will help you a little!
botania.page.blackHalo0: Black Hole Box - A handy invention for every advanced Elf to carry up to 12 Black Hole Talismans in 1 slot. $(br2)To put the Black Hole Talisman in the Black Hole Box - you need to have it in the Hotbar, and you need a given type of block in the Talisman.
botania.page.antigravityCharm0: The sphere of attraction is a mystical tool capable of stopping the movement of any falling blocks. $(br2)Now you can safely walk around without the fear that you will be crushed by sand, or anvil.
botania.page.manaCharger0: The mana charger is a device that allows you to charge up to 4 portable mana sources at once, as well as to discharge one of them. $(br2)To start the charger, you must bind a mana source to it, such as a Mana Pool or Mana Container
botania.page.nebulaArmor0: Nebula Armor is a powerful nerf gear created with Nebula Fragments and Terrastal armor. $(br2)Each piece of equipment has its own unique properties, which depend on the amount of mana, the less mana, the weaker the protective properties of the armor.
botania.page.nebulaArmor1: Characteristics of each armor item: $(br2)Nebula Helmet - boosts health $(br2)Nebula Chestplate - allows the wearer to fly, and also has a throwback resistance $(br2)Nebula Leggings - increase jump height $(br2)Nebula Boots - accelerate the host
botania.page.freyrSlingshot0: Freyr Slingshot - one of Pantheon's mythical items. The abilities of this slingshot, allow you to speed up the growth of various seeds or saplings within Natural Flash's range, as well as creating a romantic setting for livestock!
botania.page.freyrSlingshot1: In addition, when a Tree is hit by Natural Flash, it is enveloped in an instant by a previously unknown vines!$(br2)1) Fertile Liana - speeds up the growth of the seeds underneath$(br2)2) The Glowing Fertile Liana is the counterpart of the Fertile Liana, but is also capable of generating gold nuggets!
botania.tagline.engineerHopper: Hide not beautiful mechanisms deep underground! Make it beautiful!
botania.page.engineerHopper0: Engineer Hopper is a real boon for designers-engineers! Thanks to it - you can safely hide the mechanisms, from prying eyes, or just for aesthetic pleasure.$(br2)According to preliminary information from Alphirine - such funnels were used in many advanced worlds, such as Asgard and Nidavellir.
botania.page.engineerHopper1: See the item descriptions on the following pages.
botania.page.engineerHopper2: Point 1 - a place to specify the storage facility from which things will be taken for transportation. $(br2)Point 2 - A place to specify the vault where things will come in. $(br2)Point 3 - Wand of the Forest icon: shows where you can bind the vault.
botania.page.engineerHopper3: Binding the vault to the Engineer Hopper: $(br2)Step 1 - SHIFT + RCM on the hopper. $(br2)Step 2 - SHIFT + RCM on the vault. $(br2)RCM on the hopper - changes the location to indicate a vault.
botania.page.engineerHopper4: Note 1: Binding a vault to an Engineer Hopper takes the side of the vault that you selected when binding into account in the further operation of the hopper. $(br2)Note 2: The Engineer Hopper cannot pick up things that are above it as a normal Hopper does, due to a technical difference in design.
botania.tagline.nebulaRod: You're not afraid of portals, are you? Some people can't stand them, and ride the horse...
botania.page.nebulaRod0: The Nebula Staff is a magical tool of personal use, revealing the core essence of Nebula Fragments - moving! $(br2)Use this rod when you need to leave an unpleasant place urgently, or simply for travelling.
botania.page.thaumAutoCraft0: Thaumim Crafty Crate - is the counterpart to the normal Assembly Box, which creates things from the Magic Workbench. $(br2)To make it work, it requires a Taumonomicon and a wand with Vis, also different creation grids for this box!
botania.tagline.gladious: Did someone die? Where did the pieces of the whiskers come from?
botania.page.gladious0: Pure Gladiolus - The flower is designed to generate pieces - a vis for mana. It generates them randomly, due to its high sensitivity to primal aspects.
botania.tagline.gameBoard: A favourite pastime of many nerds when they are bored
botania.page.gameBoard0: Playing Board - a fun activity for nerds to relax and take a break from the drudgery of everyday life.$(br2)The game board supports 2 game modes - Play with a Friend and Single. These can be switched by SHIFT + RBM - while waiting for the next game.
botania.page.gameBoard.craft: Shall we play for mana? How's that?
botania.page.fateBoard0: Fate Playing Board - a kind of fun, just like a normal Playing Board, but - the game requires a few Destiny Cubes.$(br2)As you know - by rolling the Fate Cube you can get a relic associated with that number.$(br2)Consequently, 2 cubes will yield up to 12 relics. [Currently up to 11, with 1 more in development]
botania.tagline.richesKey: Insert, twist - open. Doesn't seem difficult...
botania.page.richesKey0: Key to Hidden Wealth - a mythical Pantheon object. Once you pick it up, chests of personal possessions immediately appear. $(br2)You can stash your valuables in each one, or simply use it while camping in the mine - it's very handy.
botania.tagline.cubeWardrobe: A double set, beautiful on the outside, strong on the inside!
botania.page.cubeWardrobe0: Nimble Сube - One of Pantheon's mythical items. Allows you to cheat during battle, or just store outfits! $(br2)The trick during combat is the cube's sensitivity to damage on the wearer. As soon as the wearer is attacked, the cube changes to the set that is set in the red area, then returns the previous outfit afterwards!
botania.tagline.sprawlRod: Poking the seeds isn't an option? Poke once - but with all your might!
botania.page.sprawlRod0: Rod of Sprawl - a magical wand capable of sticking ordinary meadow seeds into the ground with mana, with a spreading area many times larger!$(br2)Guide: How to change everything around you beyond recognition - Create the biggest balloon possible, launch it into the sky, wait for it to fall, flee the scene!
botania.page.sprawlRod.craft: And how to get it all back...
botania.tagline.azartFlower: Don't worry, you won't be left without a home...
botania.page.azartFlower0: Ardent Azarcissus - The flower is a gambler, one of the representatives of the passive flora, to make a long story short.$(br2)In fact, he can make up to 8 moves at a time on the Game Board, trying to beat the board itself. If he wins, he gives mana, the amount of which depends on the difference between the sums of the numbers on the Game Board.
botania.page.azartFlower.petalCraft: Just give him the will, and he'll give you mana.
botania.tagline.sphereNavigation: It will show you and show you the way anywhere!
botania.page.sphereNavigation0: Sphere of Navigation is a relic with the unique property of finding the specified block, through blocks, and marking the location! $(br2)For such a pleasure it is required to pay mana, and not a small amount in the long run.
botania.tagline.hornPlenty: Double booty - what could be better?
botania.page.hornPlenty0: The Horn of Plenty is a relic of one of the Ases associated with hunting!$(br2)Use the horn to charge it, charging requires some mana. After filling with mystical powers, go hunting, each time the victim dies at your hand, there is a chance to get additional drop from this creature.
botania.tagline.aquaSword: Get away from me! I'm wet...
botania.page.aquaSword0: Blade of Sea - a mystical melee weapon imbued with the powers of the seas!$(br2)An attack with Blade of the Sea is resisted by a water splash, and pushes everyone around in the direction the player is looking$(br2)The block, on the other hand, is resisted by a water shield, which prevents enemies from approaching the player.
patchouli.advancedbotany.book.name: Lexicon of Forgotten Lands
patchouli.advancedbotany.book.landing: Advanced Botany rebuilds the forgotten pages once stored in Botania's Lexica Botania. These entries preserve the original Advanced Botany lexicon text and point modern players to the current Forge, Alphirine, Petal Apothecary, and crafting recipes.
patchouli.advancedbotany.category.forgot: Lost knowledge carried over from the original Advanced Botany lexicon.
patchouli.advancedbotany.category.flower: The five special flowers rebuilt for the modern Botania flower system.
patchouli.advancedbotany.category.device: Machines, boards, mana transport, and forgotten construction techniques.
patchouli.advancedbotany.category.materi: Mithrill, Nebula fragments, and other materials used by Advanced Botany.
patchouli.advancedbotany.category.equipm: Mana tools, weapons, armor, and portable equipment.
patchouli.advancedbotany.category.relics: Pantheon relics and other rare rewards.
patchouli.advancedbotany.recipe.petal.te: This flower is made in Botania's Petal Apothecary. Use JEI to inspect the exact current ingredients.
patchouli.advancedbotany.recipe.alphirin: The original lexicon used a custom Ancient Alphirine page. In this Patchouli book the output is shown here; use JEI for the full recreation chance and input item.
patchouli.advancedbotany.recipe.advanced: The original lexicon used a custom Forge of Nidavellir page. In this Patchouli book the output is shown here; use JEI for the full mana cost and ingredient ring.
patchouli.advancedbotany.entry.magic_cra: The original text describes Thaumcraft integration. In this 1.20.1 port Thaumcraft hooks are stripped, while the block remains as an Advanced Botany machine.
patchouli.advancedbotany.tagline.wild_hu: Relic armor from the Wild Hunt
patchouli.advancedbotany.page.wild_hunt0: Wild Hunt armor and the Wild Hunt Whip are preserved as rare Advanced Botany relic equipment. The 1.7.10 source did not define a dedicated lexicon page for this set, so this Patchouli page is a modern summary entry.
patchouli.advancedbotany.page.overview0: These are the Advanced Botany pages that originally lived inside Botania's Lexica Botania. The old entries were split across Botania categories; this Patchouli rebuild keeps their text and groups them by flowers, devices, materials, equipment, and relics.
